riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)
new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: The per-peer lease-observation seam (LeaseCoordinator.peerLeaseObservations / HttpLeaseTransport.observedByPeer) already existed on main, but getSyncStatus() never adopted it — it kept counting the stale git-synced registry role field. A latent telemetry-derivation defect: the correct source was present but unwired, so awakeMachineCount read 0 while leaseHolder correctly named the holder. Reproduced live on v1.3.722 and again 2026-07-04 on the Laptop+Mini pair. No demotion/routing behavior was affected — purely the observability number.
